population: ICU patients with sepsis caused by intra-abdominal infection (IAI)
cohort_age: Mean age: survivors 69.1±13.0 years, non-survivors 70.2±13.5 years
notes: Study enrolled 2126 sepsis patients total; 901 treated in ICUs; 219 admitted to ICU due to IAI-caused sepsis. Sepsis defined per Sepsis-3 criteria (SOFA score increase ≥2).
